style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift lazily upward in soft, pastel-colored trails, refracting light into delicate rainbows. A warm, pearlescent glow emanates from Electabuzz's body, forming a delicate petal-shaped aura that pulses gently with each movement, accompanied by faint, shimmering musical note vibrations. The lighting mood is a serene, soft golden-white luminescence that bathes the scene in a dreamy, enchanted atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
